title: Weddings & Receptions
description: From intimate ceremonies to grand Telugu weddings, our 170-seat premium hall and expansive standing capacity of up to 450 guests provide the ultimate canvas for the reception of your dreams. Our elite in-house décor team meticulously curates every detail — blending breathtaking mandap aesthetics, brilliant stage lighting, and bespoke floral designs into one seamless masterpiece.

title: Engagements & Sangeet
description: Ring ceremonies, sangeet nights, and mehndi celebrations demand a venue that effortlessly balances high-energy festivity with refined elegance. Our centralised climate control ensures the dance floor remains perfectly comfortable, while our luxurious, private attached suites allow bridal parties to transition flawlessly between events.

title: Birthdays & Anniversaries
description: Whether marking a child's magical first birthday or toasting to a golden anniversary, celebrate without compromise. Our exclusive, dedicated dining lounge ensures the main celebration space stays immaculate, while your guests are treated to a curated, multi-course culinary experience — entirely free from makeshift arrangements.

title: Naming Ceremonies & Showers
description: Intimate, family-centred events require a space that feels incredibly warm and inviting, rather than cavernous. Our hall is architecturally scaled for perfect intimacy — ensuring every grandmother hears the chosen name, yet spacious enough to comfortably host your entire extended family in absolute luxury.

title: Corporate Galas
description: Elevate your team celebrations, annual dinners, and corporate off-sites. We provide a premium, fully air-conditioned environment with dedicated on-site parking for up to 50 vehicles. Say goodbye to harsh conference-room lighting and logistical headaches; our world-class in-house catering and dedicated event managers streamline everything into one seamless, professional experience.
